description: In the 'world_survey.gpkg' project, create two new weather station points in the 'field_observations' layer based on coordinate grid intersections. Create 'Station_North' at the intersection of Oslo's latitude and Rome's longitude (Notes: 'Lat Oslo, Lon Rome'). Create 'Station_South' at the intersection of Cape Town's latitude and Cairo's longitude (Notes: 'Lat Cape Town, Lon Cairo'). Reference the 'world_capitals' layer for the required city coordinates.
